title: U4 upgrade
text: U4 upgrade Drop and create all tables and procedures. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = U4 upgrade Description This option is used for data type migration, and enables you to migrate a database that does not support numerics to a database that supports numerics. When this option is enabled, the Create Table facility generates SQL commands that drop and recreate all tables and procedures. Therefore, the database objects can be upgraded to the SYB U4.0 connector. Note: The data in the tables must be exported before the upgrade scripts are executed. Otherwise, all data will be lost when the tables are dropped by the SQL script. When the Create Script utility creates the enforce referential integrity constraints in your DBMS scripts, it builds SQL to drop SYB U2.x and U3.x triggers and to create SYB U4.x or U5.x referential integrity controls. You do not need this option if you are: Migrating from a database that already provides numeric support Migrating from a "disable numerics" environment, and you plan to use the disable numerics connector option.
